name: Smoked Acorn Squash & Wild Rice Bisque - v 12
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons fresh thyme, chopped -or- 1/2 teaspoon dried thyme
2 teaspoons fresh sage, chopped -or- 1/4 teaspoon dried rubbed sage
Salt and lemon juice to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. If desired, smoke the squash halves for 20 minutes.
2. Preheat oven to 350°F. Line a shallow baking pan with foil.
3. Remove the smoked squash from the smoker.
4. Arrange the remaining squash halves in the pan, cut side down.
5. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour or until soft. Scoop out the pulp and set aside.
6. Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat.
7. Sauté onion and celery in hot oil until soft, about 4 minutes.
8. Add garlic, thyme, sage, and chili flakes. Sauté for 2 to 3 minutes.
9. Add squash pulp and chicken stock. Mix well.
10. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat and cover; simmer for 1 hour.
11. Puree in several batches until smooth. Return to the pot.
12. Stir in cream and wild rice. Add salt and lemon juice to taste.
13. Serve warm in individual bowls. Yield: 6 to 8 servings.
